name: value share
description: A value sharing (VS) decision and simulation model for heterogeneous energy communities. It calculates individual payments before affiliation and community payments after affiliation to determine the community gain (value share). It then distributes this gain using multiple allocation methods (Equal Quota, Generation-based, Consumption-based, Marginal Contribution, and a proposed Consumption-Generation pro-rate method) and evaluates them using Fairness Index, Self-Sufficiency Index, Self-Consumption Index, and Cost Savings to dynamically select the optimal community strategy.
objective: To maximize the community value and stability by selecting the value sharing method that optimizes a weighted objective function combining fairness (Fairness Index) and grid independence (Self-Sufficiency Index).

symbols.name: Timestamp
symbols.definition: Date and time of the record, used to align load, generation, and time-of-use tariffs.

symbols.name: member_id
symbols.definition: Unique identifier of the energy community member.

symbols.name: member_type
symbols.definition: The archetype category of the member (e.g. residential, prosumer, public building).

symbols.name: W_c
symbols.definition: Individual hourly energy consumption of member i at hour h.

symbols.name: W_g
symbols.definition: Individual hourly energy generation from own RES sources of member i at hour h.

symbols.name: ToU
symbols.definition: Time-of-Use electricity tariff applied for consuming energy from the grid at hour h.

symbols.name: FiT
symbols.definition: Feed-In Tariff applied for exporting energy to the grid at hour h.

symbols.name: W_gs
symbols.definition: Hourly energy generation from the community shared asset (e.g. VPP or community solar roof).

symbols.name: q
symbols.definition: Investment/ownership quota of member i in the shared generation source.

symbols.name: n
symbols.definition: Total number of members in the energy community.

symbols.name: a
symbols.definition: Weighting coefficient for the Fairness Index in the community strategy function.

symbols.name: b
symbols.definition: Weighting coefficient for the Self-Sufficiency Index in the community strategy function.

symbols.name: d_EQ
symbols.definition: Independence increase coefficient for the Equal Quota method.

symbols.name: d_CG
symbols.definition: Independence increase coefficient for the proposed Consumption-Generation method.

symbols.name: d_MC
symbols.definition: Independence increase coefficient for the Marginal Contribution method.

symbols.name: W_d
symbols.definition: Net individual hourly demand (if positive) or surplus (if negative) of member i at hour h.

symbols.name: CostI
symbols.definition: Individual cost of member i at hour h without community affiliation.

symbols.name: RevI_raw
symbols.definition: Raw individual export revenue of member i at hour h without community affiliation before shared generation credits.

symbols.name: RevI
symbols.definition: Total individual revenue of member i at hour h including shared generation credits.

symbols.name: PayI
symbols.definition: Effective payment of member i at hour h without community affiliation.

symbols.name: Pay_0
symbols.definition: Sum of all individual payments without affiliation at hour h.

symbols.name: Sum_W_d
symbols.definition: Aggregated individual net demand across all community members at hour h.

symbols.name: Rev_EC
symbols.definition: Hourly revenue earned by the energy community by selling surplus to the grid.

symbols.name: Cost_EC
symbols.definition: Hourly cost paid by the energy community to the grid to cover community deficit.

symbols.name: Pay_EC
symbols.definition: Effective community payment to the grid at hour h.

symbols.name: G_EC
symbols.definition: Total monetary gain (value share) generated by the community at hour h.

symbols.name: G_EQ
symbols.definition: Gain distributed to member i at hour h using the Equal Quota method.

symbols.name: G_G
symbols.definition: Gain distributed to member i at hour h using the Generation-based method.

symbols.name: G_C
symbols.definition: Gain distributed to member i at hour h using the Consumption-based method.

symbols.name: MC_i
symbols.definition: Marginal contribution of member i to the community gain at hour h.

symbols.name: G_MC
symbols.definition: Gain distributed to member i at hour h using the Marginal Contribution method.

symbols.name: W_net
symbols.definition: Individual net energy metered for member i at hour h, accounting for consumption, own generation, and shared generation credit.

symbols.name: qS
symbols.definition: Individual proportional contribution of member i to the community surplus at hour h.

symbols.name: qD
symbols.definition: Individual proportional contribution of member i to the community deficit at hour h.

symbols.name: G_CG
symbols.definition: Gain distributed to member i at hour h using the proposed Consumption-Generation pro-rate method.

symbols.name: Wused_i
symbols.definition: Local generation used by member i at hour h.

symbols.name: Wused_EC
symbols.definition: Local generation used in the entire community at hour h.

symbols.name: x_EQ
symbols.definition: Normalized gain for member i at hour h under Equal Quota, used in Fairness Index.

symbols.name: x_CG
symbols.definition: Normalized gain for member i at hour h under Consumption-Generation, used in Fairness Index.

symbols.name: x_MC
symbols.definition: Normalized gain for member i at hour h under Marginal Contribution, used in Fairness Index.

symbols.name: CS_i_EQ
symbols.definition: Hourly relative cost savings of member i under the Equal Quota method.

symbols.name: CS_i_CG
symbols.definition: Hourly relative cost savings of member i under the proposed Consumption-Generation method.

symbols.name: CS_i_MC
symbols.definition: Hourly relative cost savings of member i under the Marginal Contribution method.

symbols.name: CS_EC
symbols.definition: Hourly relative cost savings of the energy community.

symbols.name: SSI_i
symbols.definition: Self-sufficiency index of member i at hour h.

symbols.name: SSI_EC
symbols.definition: Self-sufficiency index of the energy community at hour h.

symbols.name: SCI_i
symbols.definition: Self-consumption index of member i at hour h.

symbols.name: SCI_EC
symbols.definition: Self-consumption index of the energy community at hour h.

symbols.name: FI_EC_EQ_avg
symbols.definition: Average Fairness Index of the community under the Equal Quota allocation method over the simulated period.

symbols.name: FI_EC_CG_avg
symbols.definition: Average Fairness Index of the community under the proposed Consumption-Generation allocation method over the simulated period.

symbols.name: FI_EC_MC_avg
symbols.definition: Average Fairness Index of the community under the Marginal Contribution allocation method over the simulated period.

symbols.name: SSI_EC_avg
symbols.definition: Average Self-Sufficiency Index of the energy community over the simulated period.

symbols.name: f_EC_EQ
symbols.definition: Objective function score evaluated for the Equal Quota method.

symbols.name: f_EC_CG
symbols.definition: Objective function score evaluated for the proposed Consumption-Generation method.

symbols.name: f_EC_MC
symbols.definition: Objective function score evaluated for the Marginal Contribution method.

symbols.name: optimal_method
symbols.definition: The name of the allocation method that maximizes the energy community objective function.

symbols.name: x_G
symbols.definition: Normalized gain for member i at hour h under Generation-based method, used in Fairness Index.

symbols.name: x_C
symbols.definition: Normalized gain for member i at hour h under Consumption-based method, used in Fairness Index.

symbols.name: FI_EC_G_avg
symbols.definition: Average Fairness Index of the community under the Generation-based allocation method over the simulated period.

symbols.name: FI_EC_C_avg
symbols.definition: Average Fairness Index of the community under the Consumption-based allocation method over the simulated period.

symbols.name: CS_EC_avg
symbols.definition: Average relative cost savings of the energy community over the simulated period.

symbols.name: SCI_EC_avg
symbols.definition: Average Self-Consumption Index of the energy community over the simulated period.

parameters.name: ToU
parameters.definition: Time-of-Use tariff mapping to the electricity costs per hour

parameters.name: FiT
parameters.definition: Feed-In tariff mapping to the electricity revenues per hour

parameters.name: W_gs
parameters.definition: Hourly solar generation profiles of shared 50 kW PV systems.

parameters.name: q
parameters.definition: Quota allocated per member. For equal share, q_i = 1/n.

parameters.name: n
parameters.definition: Total number of members in the energy community.

parameters.name: d_EQ
parameters.definition: Strategic impact value for Equal Quota method.

parameters.name: d_CG
parameters.definition: Strategic impact value for proposed CG method.

parameters.name: d_MC
parameters.definition: Strategic impact value for Marginal Contribution method.

derived_variables.name: W_d
derived_variables.definition: Individual hourly demand/surplus computation.

derived_variables.name: CostI
derived_variables.definition: Individual cost computation before community affiliation.

derived_variables.name: RevI_raw
derived_variables.definition: Individual raw revenue before shared assets allocation.

derived_variables.name: RevI
derived_variables.definition: Individual total revenue accounting for shared quota returns.

derived_variables.name: PayI
derived_variables.definition: Effective standalone payment of each member.

derived_variables.name: Pay_0
derived_variables.definition: Collective standalone baseline cost of all members.

derived_variables.name: Sum_W_d
derived_variables.definition: Aggregated community demand.

derived_variables.name: Rev_EC
derived_variables.definition: Revenue obtained from exporting local collective surplus.

derived_variables.name: Cost_EC
derived_variables.definition: Cost incurred by collective community imports.

derived_variables.name: Pay_EC
derived_variables.definition: Community aggregated grid bills.

derived_variables.name: G_EC
derived_variables.definition: Collective financial savings (surplus/gain) from aggregation.

derived_variables.name: G_EQ
derived_variables.definition: Profit sharing equally.

derived_variables.name: G_G
derived_variables.definition: Profit sharing based on investment or generation size.

derived_variables.name: G_C
derived_variables.definition: Profit sharing proportional to consumption load.

derived_variables.name: MC_i
derived_variables.definition: Calculates member's value added by computing community payouts with and without the member.

derived_variables.name: G_MC
derived_variables.definition: Profit sharing proportional to marginal contribution.

derived_variables.name: W_net
derived_variables.definition: Metered balance for each participant.

derived_variables.name: qS
derived_variables.definition: Individual surplus ratio helper.

derived_variables.name: qD
derived_variables.definition: Individual deficit ratio helper.

derived_variables.name: G_CG
derived_variables.definition: Proposed Consumption-Generation sharing method.

derived_variables.name: Wused_i
derived_variables.definition: Hourly internal consumption matching available local sources.

derived_variables.name: Wused_EC
derived_variables.definition: Total hourly consumption matched locally.

derived_variables.name: x_EQ
derived_variables.definition: Normalizing metric inputs under Equal Quota.

derived_variables.name: x_CG
derived_variables.definition: Normalizing metric inputs under proposed method.

derived_variables.name: x_MC
derived_variables.definition: Normalizing metric inputs under Marginal Contribution.

derived_variables.name: x_G
derived_variables.definition: Normalizing metric inputs under Generation-based allocation.

derived_variables.name: x_C
derived_variables.definition: Normalizing metric inputs under Consumption-based allocation.

equations.expression: W_d[t, i] = W_c[t, i] - W_g[t, i]
CostI[t, i] = W_d[t, i] * ToU[t] if W_d[t, i] > 0 else 0
RevI_raw[t, i] = -W_d[t, i] * FiT[t] if W_d[t, i] <= 0 else 0
RevI[t, i] = RevI_raw[t, i] + W_gs[t] * q[i] * FiT[t]
PayI[t, i] = CostI[t, i] - RevI[t, i]
Pay_0[t] = sum(PayI[t, i] for i in range(n))
Sum_W_d[t] = sum(W_d[t, i] for i in range(n))
Rev_EC[t] = (W_gs[t] - Sum_W_d[t]) * FiT[t] if W_gs[t] > Sum_W_d[t] else 0
Cost_EC[t] = (Sum_W_d[t] - W_gs[t]) * ToU[t] if W_gs[t] < Sum_W_d[t] else 0
Pay_EC[t] = Cost_EC[t] - Rev_EC[t]
G_EC[t] = Pay_0[t] - Pay_EC[t]
G_EQ[t, i] = G_EC[t] / n
G_G[t, i] = q[i] * G_EC[t]
G_C[t, i] = (W_c[t, i] / sum(W_c[t, j] for j in range(n))) * G_EC[t]

MC_i[t, i] = G_EC[t] - ((sum(PayI[t, j] for j in range(n) if j != i)) - ( ((sum(W_d[t, j] for j in range(n) if j != i) - W_gs[t] * (1 - q[i])) * ToU[t] if sum(W_d[t, j] for j in range(n) if j != i) > W_gs[t] * (1 - q[i]) else 0) - ((W_gs[t] * (1 - q[i]) - sum(W_d[t, j] for j in range(n) if j != i)) * FiT[t] if W_gs[t] * (1 - q[i]) > sum(W_d[t, j] for j in range(n) if j != i) else 0) ))
G_MC[t, i] = (MC_i[t, i] / sum(MC_i[t, j] for j in range(n))) * G_EC[t] if sum(MC_i[t, j] for j in range(n)) != 0 else G_EC[t] / n
W_net[t, i] = W_c[t, i] - W_g[t, i] - W_gs[t] * q[i]
qS[t, i] = W_net[t, i] / sum(W_net[t, j] for j in range(n) if W_net[t, j] < 0) if W_net[t, i] < 0 else 0
qD[t, i] = W_net[t, i] / sum(W_net[t, j] for j in range(n) if W_net[t, j] > 0) if W_net[t, i] > 0 else 0
G_CG[t, i] = ((1 - qD[t, i]) * G_EC[t] / n) if W_net[t, i] > 0 else ((1 + qS[t, i]) * G_EC[t] / n)
CS_i_EQ[t, i] = (G_EQ[t, i] / PayI[t, i]) * 100 if PayI[t, i] != 0 else 0
CS_i_CG[t, i] = (G_CG[t, i] / PayI[t, i]) * 100 if PayI[t, i] != 0 else 0
CS_i_MC[t, i] = (G_MC[t, i] / PayI[t, i]) * 100 if PayI[t, i] != 0 else 0
CS_EC[t] = (1 - Pay_EC[t] / Pay_0[t]) * 100 if Pay_0[t] != 0 else 0
Wused_i[t, i] = min(W_c[t, i], W_g[t, i] + W_gs[t] * q[i])
SSI_i[t, i] = Wused_i[t, i] / W_c[t, i] if W_c[t, i] != 0 else 1.0
Wused_EC[t] = min(sum(W_c[t, i] for i in range(n)), W_gs[t] + sum(W_g[t, i] for i in range(n)))
SSI_EC[t] = Wused_EC[t] / sum(W_c[t, i] for i in range(n)) if sum(W_c[t, i] for i in range(n)) != 0 else 1.0
SCI_i[t, i] = Wused_i[t, i] / (W_g[t, i] + W_gs[t] * q[i]) if (W_g[t, i] + W_gs[t] * q[i]) != 0 else 1.0
SCI_EC[t] = Wused_EC[t] / (W_gs[t] + sum(W_g[t, i] for i in range(n))) if (W_gs[t] + sum(W_g[t, i] for i in range(n))) != 0 else 1.0
x_EQ[t, i] = G_EQ[t, i] / (W_g[t, i] + W_gs[t] * q[i]) if (W_g[t, i] + W_gs[t] * q[i]) != 0 else 0
x_CG[t, i] = G_CG[t, i] / (W_g[t, i] + W_gs[t] * q[i]) if (W_g[t, i] + W_gs[t] * q[i]) != 0 else 0
x_MC[t, i] = G_MC[t, i] / (W_g[t, i] + W_gs[t] * q[i]) if (W_g[t, i] + W_gs[t] * q[i]) != 0 else 0
FI_EC_EQ_avg = average_over_time((1 / n) * (sum(x_EQ[t, i] for i in range(n)) ** 2) / sum((x_EQ[t, i]) ** 2 for i in range(n)))
FI_EC_CG_avg = average_over_time((1 / n) * (sum(x_CG[t, i] for i in range(n)) ** 2) / sum((x_CG[t, i]) ** 2 for i in range(n)))
FI_EC_MC_avg = average_over_time((1 / n) * (sum(x_MC[t, i] for i in range(n)) ** 2) / sum((x_MC[t, i]) ** 2 for i in range(n)))
SSI_EC_avg = average_over_time(SSI_EC[t])
f_EC_EQ = a * FI_EC_EQ_avg + b * SSI_EC_avg * (1 + d_EQ)
f_EC_CG = a * FI_EC_CG_avg + b * SSI_EC_avg * (1 + d_CG)
f_EC_MC = a * FI_EC_MC_avg + b * SSI_EC_avg * (1 + d_MC)
optimal_method = select_max_method_name({'EQ': f_EC_EQ, 'CG': f_EC_CG, 'MC': f_EC_MC})
x_G[t, i] = G_G[t, i] / (W_g[t, i] + W_gs[t] * q[i]) if (W_g[t, i] + W_gs[t] * q[i]) != 0 else 0
x_C[t, i] = G_C[t, i] / (W_g[t, i] + W_gs[t] * q[i]) if (W_g[t, i] + W_gs[t] * q[i]) != 0 else 0
FI_EC_G_avg = average_over_time((1 / n) * (sum(x_G[t, i] for i in range(n)) ** 2) / sum((x_G[t, i]) ** 2 for i in range(n)))
FI_EC_C_avg = average_over_time((1 / n) * (sum(x_C[t, i] for i in range(n)) ** 2) / sum((x_C[t, i]) ** 2 for i in range(n)))
CS_EC_avg = average_over_time(CS_EC[t])
SCI_EC_avg = average_over_time(SCI_EC[t])

steps.name: Demand evaluation
pseudocode: for each timestep t and member i:
W_d[t, i] = W_c[t, i] - W_g[t, i]

steps.name: Individual baseline payouts
pseudocode: for each timestep t:
for each member i:
CostI[t, i] = W_d[t, i] * ToU[t] if W_d[t, i] > 0 else 0
RevI_raw[t, i] = -W_d[t, i] * FiT[t] if W_d[t, i] <= 0 else 0
RevI[t, i] = RevI_raw[t, i] + W_gs[t] * q[i] * FiT[t]
PayI[t, i] = CostI[t, i] - RevI[t, i]
Pay_0[t] = sum(PayI[t, i] for i in range(n))

steps.name: Energy Community aggregations
pseudocode: for each timestep t:
Sum_W_d[t] = sum(W_d[t, i] for i in range(n))
Rev_EC[t] = (W_gs[t] - Sum_W_d[t]) * FiT[t] if W_gs[t] > Sum_W_d[t] else 0
Cost_EC[t] = (Sum_W_d[t] - W_gs[t]) * ToU[t] if W_gs[t] < Sum_W_d[t] else 0
Pay_EC[t] = Cost_EC[t] - Rev_EC[t]
G_EC[t] = Pay_0[t] - Pay_EC[t]

steps.name: Baseline value sharing allocation
pseudocode: for each timestep t and member i:
G_EQ[t, i] = G_EC[t] / n
G_G[t, i] = q[i] * G_EC[t]
G_C[t, i] = (W_c[t, i] / sum(W_c[t, j] for j in range(n))) * G_EC[t]

steps.name: Marginal contribution allocation
pseudocode: for each timestep t and member i:
MC_i[t, i] = G_EC[t] - G_without_i(t, i)
G_MC[t, i] = (MC_i[t, i] / sum(MC_i[t, j] for j in range(n))) * G_EC[t]

steps.name: Consumption-Generation pro-rate allocation
pseudocode: for each timestep t:
for each member i:
W_net[t, i] = W_c[t, i] - W_g[t, i] - W_gs[t] * q[i]
for each member i:
qS[t, i] = W_net[t, i] / sum(W_net[t, j] for j in range(n) if W_net[t, j] < 0) if W_net[t, i] < 0 else 0
qD[t, i] = W_net[t, i] / sum(W_net[t, j] for j in range(n) if W_net[t, j] > 0) if W_net[t, i] > 0 else 0
G_CG[t, i] = ((1 - qD[t, i]) * G_EC[t] / n) if W_net[t, i] > 0 else ((1 + qS[t, i]) * G_EC[t] / n)

steps.name: Self-Sufficiency and Savings Assessment
pseudocode: for each timestep t:
Wused_EC[t] = min(sum(W_c[t, i]), W_gs[t] + sum(W_g[t, i]))
SSI_EC[t] = Wused_EC[t] / sum(W_c[t, i])
SCI_EC[t] = Wused_EC[t] / (W_gs[t] + sum(W_g[t, i]))
CS_EC[t] = (1 - Pay_EC[t]/Pay_0[t])*100
for each member i:
Wused_i[t, i] = min(W_c[t, i], W_g[t, i] + W_gs[t] * q[i])
SSI_i[t, i] = Wused_i[t, i] / W_c[t, i]
SCI_i[t, i] = Wused_i[t, i] / (W_g[t, i] + W_gs[t] * q[i])
CS_i_EQ[t, i] = (G_EQ[t, i]/PayI[t, i])*100
CS_i_CG[t, i] = (G_CG[t, i]/PayI[t, i])*100
CS_i_MC[t, i] = (G_MC[t, i]/PayI[t, i])*100

steps.name: Fairness index calculations
pseudocode: for each timestep t and member i:
x_EQ[t, i] = G_EQ[t, i] / (W_g[t, i] + W_gs[t]*q[i])
x_CG[t, i] = G_CG[t, i] / (W_g[t, i] + W_gs[t]*q[i])
x_MC[t, i] = G_MC[t, i] / (W_g[t, i] + W_gs[t]*q[i])
Compute average Jain's fairness index for EQ, CG, MC over period
Compute average SSI_EC_avg

steps.name: Strategic Decision Formulation
pseudocode: f_EC_EQ = a * FI_EC_EQ_avg + b * SSI_EC_avg * (1 + d_EQ)
f_EC_CG = a * FI_EC_CG_avg + b * SSI_EC_avg * (1 + d_CG)
f_EC_MC = a * FI_EC_MC_avg + b * SSI_EC_avg * (1 + d_MC)
optimal_method = select_max_name({'EQ': f_EC_EQ, 'CG': f_EC_CG, 'MC': f_EC_MC})

input_mapping.transformation: Reshape from long-format to matrix of size (T x n) where T is the number of timesteps and n is the number of members.
Reshape from long-format to matrix of size (T x n) matching timesteps and members.
Used as the index of the timesteps.
Used to group and uniquely identify each of the n members.

tariff_mapping.transformation: Map hourly rate based on hour of the day: peak hours (14:00 to 23:00) mapped to 0.8 EUR/kWh, and off-peak mapped to 0.5 EUR/kWh.
Set as a constant rate of 0.3 EUR/kWh across all timesteps.

parameter_initialization.default_value: pandas Series of length T containing shared PV generation profile
numpy array of length n containing equal quotas (1/n) if not provided

pseudocode: Step 1: Calculate individual demand/surplus W_d[t, i] = W_c[t, i] - W_g[t, i] for all t and i.
Step 2: Compute baseline CostI[t, i] = W_d[t, i] * ToU[t] if W_d[t, i] > 0 else 0.
Step 3: Compute baseline RevI_raw[t, i] = -W_d[t, i] * FiT[t] if W_d[t, i] <= 0 else 0.
Step 4: Compute individual revenues RevI[t, i] = RevI_raw[t, i] + W_gs[t] * q[i] * FiT[t].
Step 5: Compute individual Standalone payment PayI[t, i] = CostI[t, i] - RevI[t, i].
Step 6: Aggregate stand-alone payments Pay_0[t] = sum over members i of PayI[t, i].
Step 7: Sum community demands Sum_W_d[t] = sum over members i of W_d[t, i].
Step 8: Compute Community Revenue Rev_EC[t] = (W_gs[t] - Sum_W_d[t]) * FiT[t] if W_gs[t] > Sum_W_d[t] else 0.
Step 9: Compute Community Cost Cost_EC[t] = (Sum_W_d[t] - W_gs[t]) * ToU[t] if Sum_W_d[t] > W_gs[t] else 0.
Step 10: Compute Community Payment Pay_EC[t] = Cost_EC[t] - Rev_EC[t].
Step 11: Compute Community Gain G_EC[t] = Pay_0[t] - Pay_EC[t].
Step 12: Distribute gains via Equal Quota G_EQ[t, i] = G_EC[t] / n.
Step 13: Distribute gains via Generation-based G_G[t, i] = q[i] * G_EC[t].
Step 14: Distribute gains via Consumption-based G_C[t, i] = (W_c[t, i] / sum over j of W_c[t, j]) * G_EC[t].

Step 15: Compute Marginal Contribution MC_i[t, i] for each member i by subtracting the gain of community without i from G_EC[t]. Specifically, evaluate the payment without i: sum of W_d over j != i against W_gs * (1 - q_i) using ToU and FiT, subtract this from standalone payments of all other members, and compute the difference from G_EC.
Step 16: Distribute gains via Marginal Contribution G_MC[t, i] = (MC_i[t, i] / sum over j of MC_i[t, j]) * G_EC[t]. If sum is 0, fallback to G_EC[t] / n.
Step 17: Compute individual net energy metered W_net[t, i] = W_c[t, i] - W_g[t, i] - W_gs[t] * q[i].
Step 18: Compute surplus quota qS[t, i] = W_net[t, i] / sum over j where W_net[t, j] < 0 if W_net[t, i] < 0 else 0.
Step 19: Compute deficit quota qD[t, i] = W_net[t, i] / sum over j where W_net[t, j] > 0 if W_net[t, i] > 0 else 0.
Step 20: Compute Consumption-Generation share G_CG[t, i] = (1 - qD[t, i]) * G_EC[t] / n if W_net[t, i] > 0 else (1 + qS[t, i]) * G_EC[t] / n.
Step 21: Compute used local generation Wused_i[t, i] = min(W_c[t, i], W_g[t, i] + W_gs[t] * q[i]).
Step 22: Compute individual Self-Sufficiency index SSI_i[t, i] = Wused_i[t, i] / W_c[t, i] (or 1.0 if W_c is 0).
Step 23: Compute used community generation Wused_EC[t] = min(sum over i of W_c[t, i], W_gs[t] + sum over i of W_g[t, i]).
Step 24: Compute Community Self-Sufficiency Index SSI_EC[t] = Wused_EC[t] / sum over i of W_c[t, i] (or 1.0 if sum is 0).
Step 25: Compute individual Self-Consumption Index SCI_i[t, i] = Wused_i[t, i] / (W_g[t, i] + W_gs[t] * q[i]) (or 1.0 if denominator is 0).
Step 26: Compute Community Self-Consumption Index SCI_EC[t] = Wused_EC[t] / (W_gs[t] + sum over i of W_g[t, i]) (or 1.0 if denominator is 0).
Step 27: Compute individual hourly savings CS_i_EQ, CS_i_CG, CS_i_MC using the formula: (G[t, i] / PayI[t, i]) * 100. Default to 0 if PayI[t, i] is 0.
Step 28: Compute Community savings CS_EC[t] = (1 - Pay_EC[t] / Pay_0[t]) * 100 (or 0 if Pay_0[t] is 0).
Step 29: Calculate normalized gains x_EQ, x_CG, x_MC, x_G, and x_C by dividing distributed gains by (W_g[t, i] + W_gs[t] * q[i]). Default to 0 if denominator is 0.

Step 30: Calculate Jain's fairness index per timestep t for EQ, CG, MC, G-based, and C-based, then take the average over all t to obtain FI_EC_EQ_avg, FI_EC_CG_avg, FI_EC_MC_avg, FI_EC_G_avg, and FI_EC_C_avg.
Step 31: Compute scalar metric averages over simulated time: SSI_EC_avg = mean(SSI_EC), SCI_EC_avg = mean(SCI_EC), and CS_EC_avg = mean(CS_EC).

Step 32: Evaluate strategy objectives: f_EC_EQ = a * FI_EC_EQ_avg + b * SSI_EC_avg * (1 + d_EQ), f_EC_CG = a * FI_EC_CG_avg + b * SSI_EC_avg * (1 + d_CG), f_EC_MC = a * FI_EC_MC_avg + b * SSI_EC_avg * (1 + d_MC).
Step 33: Find the method name that yields the maximum value among f_EC_EQ, f_EC_CG, f_EC_MC and assign it to optimal_method.
validation_checks: Check that load (W_c) and generation (W_g) are of identical shape.
Ensure that length of parameters W_gs and ToU matches the number of timesteps T.
Validate that member quota q sums up to 1.0 (or is close to 1.0 within epsilon).
Check that the parameters a and b are positive scalars.
Verify that division by zero is handled when calculating self-sufficiency index, self-consumption index, cost savings, normalized gains, and Jain's fairness index.
